args.text: Severity assessment confirmed: CVE-2026-30117 is a high-severity session-fixation vulnerability in the token refresh path affecting auth-api and session-store. All staff sessions must be re-established post-patch.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patch window confirmed
args.body:
Patch window confirmed for CVE-2026-30117 (high-severity session-fixation vulnerability).

Affected services and versions:
- auth-api: v5.8.4
- session-store: v2.2.9

Deployment will proceed immediately following this confirmation.

args.text: Both services successfully patched and verified: auth-api running v5.8.4, session-store running v2.2.9.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body:
CVE-2026-30117 patching is complete and verified.

Deployed versions:
- auth-api: v5.8.4
- session-store: v2.2.9

Credential rotation and staff session re-establishment will follow.

args.text: Credential rotation completed: all active refresh tokens invalidated, signing keys rotated, old keys confirmed as rejected.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body:
A critical security update (CVE-2026-30117) has been applied to Arclight's authentication systems. All staff sessions have been invalidated as part of this remediation.

Please sign in again to re-establish your session. Your existing session tokens are no longer valid.

Thank you for your attention to this security matter.
